title: Google Antigravity CLI Full Walkthrough
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that evolves the IDE into an agent-first era. The platform enables developers to manage agents across workspaces with an AI IDE experience, while agents autonomously plan and execute complex, end-to-end tasks across editor, terminal, and browser.
